RC_PROFILE_SWITCH_GUARD_ENABLED.description: Enable validation guards when switching profile types (dealer/company requirements check)

RC_DEALERSHIP_MIGRATION_ENABLED.description: Enable dealership data migration from legacy structure to new dealerships collection

RC_PROFILE_TYPE_RESTRICTIONS.description: Profile type restrictions and limits (JSON format)

RC_MAINTENANCE_MODE.description: Enable maintenance mode to prevent profile changes during system updates

version.description: Initial Remote Config template for Profile Type System
